category_sources: source_facts.description says dynamic language and bytecode VM; official Janet homepage describes a functional and imperative programming language with interpreter, compiler, assembler, and embedding support.
display_name_sources: Official homepage title is Janet Programming Language; source_facts.name is janet.
docs_sources: Official Janet homepage links to Documentation and Core API.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/janet-lang/janet, so repo was left null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies dynamic language and bytecode VM; official homepage describes Janet as embeddable, C99-based, and suitable for system scripting.
